title: Cynorkis nervilabris

This family comprises over 30,000 known species, making it the second-largest family of flowering plants. The Orchidaceae family is further divided into 763 genera, with Cynorkis being one of them. intro: Cynorkis nervilabris, also known as the Nerve-lipped Cynorchis, is a species of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Cynorkis nervilabris include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Cynorkis nervilabris is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of a tincture or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
